title: 2026 LG OLED evo TVs are getting a new Creator Original picture mode - Engadget
summary: LG Electronics is rolling out a new picture mode called Creator Original for select TV models. Neutral picture modes like Filmmaker essentially exist as an answer to modern TVs' heavy post-processing, disabling accoutrements like motion smoothing for a more traditional presentation.
